name: Huckleberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 each Pastry for double crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure ingredients into a two-quart mixing bowl and mix well.
2. Pour mixture into an unbaked pie shell.
3. Cover with top crust.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for about one hour or until nicely browned.
5. Makes one 9-inch pie.
